title: FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE - 211info
text: ROSEBURG FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-3500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans, Oregon Health Plan and Medicare. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Contraception Diabetes Management Clinics General Medical Care Hepatitis Testing Individual Counseling Integrated Physical/Mental Health Services Postpartum Care Smoking/Vaping Cessation Therapy Referrals Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MOBILE MEDICAL CLINIC SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSEBURG
